fields.prompt_text: Is this social media interaction legitimate or a scam?
fields.subject: Public Reply to your Tweet
fields.body: We are sorry you are experiencing issues with the student portal. Please DM us your student ID and password so we can reset your account manually, or visit: http://tudublin-support-desk.info

fields.prompt_text: Is this social media interaction legitimate or a scam?
fields.subject: Public Tweet/Post
fields.body: I'm feeling generous today! The first 1,000 people to send 0.1 BTC to my wallet address will receive 1.0 BTC back! Click the link below to participate: http://crypto-doubler-event.net

fields.feedback_text: Correct! This is a classic cryptocurrency doubling scam. Scammers buy verified badges to impersonate celebrities and trick followers into sending money to untraceable wallets.
Incorrect. This is a classic cryptocurrency doubling scam. Scammers buy verified badges to impersonate celebrities and trick followers into sending money to untraceable wallets.
Incorrect. This is a classic cryptocurrency doubling scam. Scammers buy verified badges to impersonate celebrities and trick followers into sending money to untraceable wallets.

fields.feedback_text: Correct! Your friend's account has been compromised. This is a credential harvesting scam. Clicking the link will likely lead to a fake login page designed to steal your password.
Incorrect. Your friend's account has been compromised. This is a credential harvesting scam. Clicking the link will likely lead to a fake login page designed to steal your password.

fields.prompt_text: Is this social media interaction legitimate or a scam?
fields.subject: Facebook Messenger
fields.body: Omg is this a video of you?? 😱 I can't believe someone posted this! Watch it here before it gets taken down: http://facebook-video-login-secure.com

fields.feedback_text: Correct! Your friend's account has been compromised. This is a credential harvesting scam. Clicking the link will likely lead to a fake login page designed to steal your password.
Incorrect. Your friend's account has been compromised. This is a credential harvesting scam. Clicking the link will likely lead to a fake login page designed to steal your password.

fields.prompt_text: Is this social media interaction legitimate or a scam?
fields.subject: Instagram Story / Post
fields.body: Happy Friday! Show this post to the barista today to get 10% off your morning coffee. ☕️

fields.feedback_text: Incorrect. This is a standard local business promotion. It does not require you to click a shady link, fill out a survey, or provide personal data.
Incorrect. This is a standard local business promotion. It does not require you to click a shady link, fill out a survey, or provide personal data.
Correct! This is a standard local business promotion. It does not require you to click a shady link, fill out a survey, or provide personal data.

fields.prompt_text: Is this social media interaction legitimate or a scam?
fields.subject: Instagram Sponsored Ad
fields.body: 🎉 HUGE GIVEAWAY! 🎉 We are giving away €500 gift cards to the first 500 people who fill out our survey! Claim yours now: http://claim-shein-giftcard.net

fields.feedback_text: Correct! This is a survey scam. These ads promise massive rewards but are designed to harvest your personal information (email, phone, address) to sell to third parties.
Incorrect. This is a survey scam. These ads promise massive rewards but are designed to harvest your personal information (email, phone, address) to sell to third parties.
Incorrect. This is a survey scam. These ads promise massive rewards but are designed to harvest your personal information (email, phone, address) to sell to third parties.

fields.prompt_text: Is this social media interaction legitimate or a scam?
fields.subject: Direct Message (DM)
fields.body: Your account has been reported for copyright violation. If you do not verify your identity within 24 hours, your account will be permanently deleted. Click here: http://ig-copyright-appeal.com

fields.feedback_text: Correct! This is an impersonation scam. Official support teams do not DM users with threats of immediate deletion. The URL is clearly unaffiliated with Instagram.
Incorrect. This is an impersonation scam. Official support teams do not DM users with threats of immediate deletion. The URL is clearly unaffiliated with Instagram.
